title: hieracium pannosum subsp. mokragorae
intro: Hieracium pannosum subsp. mokragorae, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Hieracium pannosum subsp. mokragorae include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
